text.title: Fine-tune vs Prompt+RAG Decision Tree Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Fine-tune vs Prompt+RAG Decision Tree output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: next model major version OR 6 months

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: alternatives_tried populated with a typed value
decision populated with a typed value
decision_rationale populated with a typed value
eval_baseline populated with a typed value
budget_labor_hours populated with a typed value
revisit_trigger populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
